title: erythronium americanum subsp. americanum
intro: Erythronium americanum subsp. americanum, also known as the American dogtooth violet or trout lily, is a perennial plant species belonging to the lily family (Liliaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Erythronium americanum subsp. americanum include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate pain, and support immune function. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is also used in traditional herbal remedies for its antiseptic and wound-healing properties.
